headline: Hershey to Participate in Goldman Sachs Global Staples Forum on May 12, 2026
summary: The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) today announced that Steve Voskuil, Chief Financial Officer, will participate in a fireside chat session at the Goldman Sachs Global Staples Forum on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, at 11:25 am ET. A live audio webcast of the presentation will be available on the Investors section of the Company's corporate website at https://investors.thehersheycompany.com/ under Events & Webcasts. A replay of the webcast will be available on the Company's website following the event.

headline: Hershey Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Hershey has struggled to keep up with the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain skeptical about the stock’s prospects.
